_doc: The 6 Panji. mods are stat modifiers applied at match start (data-driven, no faction-specific code paths). ult describes the hero ultimate; cooldown in seconds.

semaun.name: Panji Semaun
semaun.heroTitle: Awang Semaun, the Giant of Legend

ult.name: Kekuatan Gergasi
ult.desc: Ground slam: AoE damage, knockback and 3s stun around the hero.

sakam.name: Panji Sakam
sakam.heroTitle: Pengiran Muda Sakam, Blade of Kota Batu

ult.name: Serbuan Berani Mati
ult.desc: Summons 100 spectral warriors that charge the enemy for 30s.

hassan.name: Panji Hassan
hassan.bonusText: Walls & towers +25% HP; +2 armor near hero or Istana

ult.name: Perintah Adil
ult.desc: 15s: allies in radius gain a damage-absorbing shield, +20% attack speed, and immunity to conversion.

shahbandar.name: Panji Shahbandar
shahbandar.heroTitle: Pg. Shahbandar Pg. Mohd. Salleh, the Reformer
shahbandar.bonusText: Trade income +25%; +1 vision on all units

ult.name: Lidah Pujangga
ult.desc: Permanently converts up to 5 enemy units in a radius (heroes immune).

saman.name: Panji Saman
saman.heroTitle: Haji Saman, Flame of the Resistance
saman.bonusText: Villagers +50% HP and fight well; units cost 5% less Food

ult.name: Bara Perjuangan
ult.desc: 20s: nearby villagers transform into ember-wreathed militia, then revert.

badar.name: Panji Badar
badar.bonusText: +1 line of sight; units in the treeline are hidden until they strike

ult.name: Mata Strategi
ult.desc: Reveals the whole map for 10s; marked enemies take +25% damage for 15s.
